name: Prestige4WAVE
shortDescription: 1200W diode laser with compressor cooling. 5 interchangeable spot sizes, HD touchscreen handpiece, 80%+ hair reduction after 3-4 treatments.
description:
The Prestige4WAVE is a next-generation, 1200W professional diode laser that provides maximum efficiency on all skin types and hair types with 4 different wavelengths.

The device features a compressor cooling system that ensures stable, continuous operation and excellent heat dissipation.

The handpiece has an HD touchscreen display, allowing treatment parameters to be adjusted directly on the handpiece.
metaTitle: Diode laser hair removal device 1200W – 755/808/940/1064 nm
metaDescription: The Prestige 4Wave 1200W diode laser provides professional, long-lasting hair removal with 4 wavelengths. With official training and certified education.

videoDescription.headline: Prestige4WAVE – High performance, professional results
paragraphs: The Prestige4WAVE is a next-generation, 1200W professional diode laser that provides maximum efficiency on all skin types and hair types with 4 different wavelengths.

The device features a compressor cooling system that ensures stable, continuous operation and excellent heat dissipation. The handpiece has an HD touchscreen display, allowing treatment parameters to be adjusted directly on the handpiece.
The HR Preset and HR Professional modes enable fast and easy operation even in high-traffic salons.

featureRows.headline: Why do beauticians choose the Prestige4WAVE?
featureRows.subtitle: 1200W power, compressor cooling, 5 interchangeable spot sizes

features.title: 4 wavelengths – for all skin types and hair colors
features.description:
The Prestige4WAVE operates on four wavelengths, providing effective and safe treatment for all hair and skin types.

Wavelengths:

755 nm – light, fine hair
808 nm – universal, most hair types
940 nm – darker hair
1064 nm – deep-seated hair follicles

features.title: 1200W power – for fast and lasting hair removal
features.description: The 1200W power enables faster coverage of larger areas, significantly reducing treatment time. Clinical studies show over 80% hair reduction in 95% of cases after 3-5 treatments.

features.title: Advanced compressor cooling system
features.description:
The compressor cooling system is faster and more efficient than traditional TEC cooling. Contact temperature between -5°C and +5°C ensures maximum comfort.
Starts at 22°C, stops at 19°C (adjustable)
Stable operating temperature around 20°C
360° Peltier ring + sapphire contact cooling
features.highlight: Compressor cooling enables long-lasting, painless, and safe treatments.

features.title: 5 interchangeable spot sizes – for every body area
features.description:
5 different sizes for every area of the body – small spot heads for the face and intimate areas, large heads for fast body treatments.
Φ8 mm
5×5 mm
10×10 mm
12×20 mm
20×40 mm

features.title: Intelligent HD touchscreen handpiece
features.description:
The handpiece's modern, high-resolution, color touchscreen allows full parameter control directly on the handpiece.
Laser intensity adjustment
Pulse width adjustment
Frequency adjustment
HR Preset and HR Professional modes

training.headline: Device operator training – within official adult education
training.intro: When purchasing the Prestige4WAVE, we provide official training included in the price of the device. During the training, we thoroughly demonstrate the device operation, safety regulations, treatment protocols, and practical guidelines for client treatments.
items: Operating principles and safety aspects of diode laser technology
Application areas and settings for 4 wavelengths
Treatment protocols for different skin and hair types
closingParagraphs: Upon completion of the training, we issue an officially registered adult education certificate confirming competence for professional device operation.
This is particularly important for regulatory compliance and ensuring professional service delivery.

specs.Operating modes: HR Preset, HR Professional, skin rejuvenation

faq.question: What makes the Prestige4WAVE different from other diode lasers?
faq.answer: The Prestige4WAVE stands out with its 1200W power, compressor cooling system, and 5 interchangeable spot sizes. The HD touchscreen handpiece allows you to adjust treatment parameters directly on the handpiece, enabling faster and more comfortable operation.

faq.question: What are the advantages of compressor cooling?
faq.answer: The compressor cooling system is faster and more efficient than traditional TEC cooling. It maintains a stable operating temperature around 20°C, making treatments longer-lasting, more painless, and safer.

faq.question: How quickly does the Prestige4WAVE pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-4 months, with 5-8 clients per day. A diode laser hair removal treatment costs between 15,000-50,000 Ft depending on the treated area. Use our ROI calculator on the page for exact calculations!

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: Official device operator training is included in the price of the Prestige4WAVE. The training concludes with an officially registered adult education certificate confirming competence for professional device operation.

faq.question: Is it possible to see the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the Prestige4WAVE in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment.
